risk_summary: Political and Governance risk rating has increased from 'Substantial' at project approval (April 2018) to 'High' at the last approved rating (January 2025), indicating worsening political instability or governance fragility affecting project implementation.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance High Substantial Substantial [Risk Category Rating at Approval Approval Package - 02 Apr 2018 | Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 017 - 28 Jan 2025 | Proposed Rating]

risk_summary: One grievance remains unresolved in Dire Dawa utility despite project efforts, suggesting tensions between government implementing agencies and beneficiary communities that may reflect broader governance fragility.
evidence_quote: A total of 33 grievances have been recorded in AA (22) and DD (11). All 22 cases in AA have been resolved while 10 out of the 11 have been resolved in DD. The MoWE and the DD utility are working to fully address the issue related to the pending grievance requet.
